title: Yuko Miyamura Eva 7th Pachinko Cover
wikitext:
[]: Yuko Miyamura Eva 7th Pachinko Cover             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Oct 24, 2011 12:47 pm I guess this is the best thread: So for the CRC Eva games, usually Megumi Hayashibara sings the theme song. Apparently for the latest one it'll be Yuko Miyamura as Asuka Shikinami! (It's a cover of the Death and Rebirth song, "Heart, Return to your Origin") Kind of cool, I wonder if they'll get Maaya Sakamoto on this at some point too: http://www.cdjapan.co.jp/detailview.html?KEY=KICM-1343 EDIT: Finally decided to make a split/its own thread!

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Mon Oct 24, 2011 1:17 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: So for the CRC Eva games, usually Megumi Hayashibara sings the theme song. Apparently for the latest one it'll be Yuko Miyamura as Asuka Shikinami!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Dec 21, 2011 1:03 pm Information of the songs listed and the image of the CD, horrible picture of Asuka Shikinami, she looks off: http://www.starchild.co.jp/artist/miyamura/ (Of course, there's few and far inbetween pictures of Rei looking bad, meh.)

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Jan 10, 2012 4:10 pm Miyamu's cover of Heart Return To Your Origin is released today in Japan. Anybody bothered to order it? I'll probably uh listen to it online. I just can't get over how horrid that cover artwork of Shikinami is. >_> I'm somewhat curious on what the second song is, it seems to be new...? (At first I thought it was a cover of Happiness is the Smell of Sin but I guess it's not.) Here's a short clip from the Pachinko game on Youtube: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1SStTL8jJgY It's not horrible but yeah.

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Tue Jan 10, 2012 7:44 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Miyamu's cover of Heart Return To Your Origin is released today in Japan. Anybody bothered to order it? I'll probably uh listen to it online. I just can't get over how horrid that cover artwork of Shikinami is. >_>

[]:             Quote Post by ReiAyanami25 » Tue Jan 10, 2012 10:08 pm symbv wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Jan 12, 2012 1:57 pm The game largely farms on Ha, no wonder that they've used the test suit, but the illustration is really bad. Anyway, someone uploaded "Kokoro Yo Genshi ni Modore 〜2012Version〜" on Nicovideo , I was a little sceptic but it's not bad at all; I still have no clue about the new song.

[]:             Quote Post by deeRez » Thu Jan 12, 2012 2:27 pm The picture is not that bad. It looks like it was done mixing a 3D model with hand-drawn elements. This is the original PNG with transparency:

[]:             Quote Post by Deyno » Thu Jan 12, 2012 2:37 pm i want to listen it where are the download?

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Thu Jan 12, 2012 2:41 pm ^ ^ Still looks a bit odd to me though....

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jan 12, 2012 5:10 pm It's not up in the usual places other than the first song on Nico. Use your .

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Jan 12, 2012 6:06 pm deeRez wrote: The picture is not that bad. It looks like it was done mixing a 3D model with hand-drawn elements.

[]:             Quote Post by deeRez » Thu Jan 12, 2012 6:23 pm Hyper Shinchan wrote: It's probably the face, the rest isn't that bad but I can't stop thinking that her face is weird.

[]:             Quote Post by Final Messenger » Thu Jan 12, 2012 7:19 pm I don’t really care for that cover art either.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Fri Jan 20, 2012 9:25 pm Someone uploaded the new song, Shiawase no Betsumei, on Youtube . The album can be found in the usual place.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Sat Jan 21, 2012 1:05 am Yuko needs to do a 2012 version of "Get It On! Doppelganger".

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Sat Jan 21, 2012 1:09 am Sales has been so-so. Debuted at #34 in Oricon Weekly Singles Chart and sales was put at 2324 copies.... (meanwhile seiyuu-singer Nana Mizuki's latest single Synchrogazer debuted in the same week at #2 and sales was put at 51017 copies, but then Nana Mizuki is famous enough to be invited to NHK's Kouhaku Singing Tournament 3 years in row)

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sat Jan 21, 2012 1:09 am Fazmotron wrote: Yuko needs to do a 2012 version of "Get It On! Doppelganger".

[]:             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Sat Jan 21, 2012 2:11 am symbv wrote: Sales has been so-so. Debuted at #34 in Oricon Weekly Singles Chart and sales was put at 2324 copies.... (meanwhile seiyuu-singer Nana Mizuki's latest single Synchrogazer debuted in the same week at #2 and sales was put at 51017 copies, but then Nana Mizuki is famous enough to be invited to NHK's Kouhaku Singing Tournament 3 years in row)

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sat Jan 21, 2012 3:22 pm deeRez wrote: The picture is not that bad. It looks like it was done mixing a 3D model with hand-drawn elements.
